experience.title: Freelance Web developer
experience.description: I am a full stack web developer , i work with : HTML , CSS , JAVASCRIPT , BOOTSTRAP , TAILWIND CSS and REACT JS in the Frontend dev , and DJANGO framework for the Backend dev.

And i am the head of this department .

experience.title: Video Editor & Designer
experience.description: From my childhood i wanted to be a famous guy or a youtuber , so iwas really intrested in how to make professional videos and i beacame a content creator who simplifies complex scientific topics in short videos and i have more than 20k followers on tiktok . But unfortunetly i couldn't continue in this path because i have a lot of work and studies to work on ...

experience.title: CEO & Founder of Hippo Dz
experience.description: Founded and developed Hippo Dz (hippodz.com), a medical educational platform designed to provide accessible healthcare education and resources. The platform has grown to over 2000 registered users and 5000+ active users, providing comprehensive medical learning tools and interactive content.

experience.title: President & Founder of Zenith Scientific Club
experience.description: Founded and leading a scientific club at the Faculty of Medicine Oran with a mission to bring medicine and technology together. Organizing events, workshops, and projects that bridge the gap between medical education and technological innovation.
